name: Virtual Starlink Consultation
short_description: Expert virtual consultation for Starlink Gen 3 and Mini systems — ideal for rural homeowners, RV travelers, and farmers across East Texas, Southwest Arkansas, Northwest Louisiana, and Southeast Oklahoma.

name: Electrical Troubleshooting
short_description: Professional electrical troubleshooting and installation in East Texas.

name: Light Fixture Installation
short_description: Professional light fixture installation including mounting and secure wiring to your existing junction box.

name: Smart Home Device Setup
short_description: Setup and network integration for smart home devices including smart plugs, smart switches, Alexa and Google Home hubs, and automated lighting systems.

name: Starlink Ground Pole Mount
short_description: Custom ground pole installation for Starlink dishes requiring a clear line of sight — perfect for East Texas properties with trees, barns, or obstructed rooftops.

name: Wi-Fi Mesh & Network Extension
short_description: Eliminate Wi-Fi dead zones permanently with a professionally configured mesh network.

name: Ethernet Drop (Cat6)
short_description: Hardwired Cat6 ethernet run through walls, attic, or crawl space for a single device — gaming systems, desktop PCs, smart TVs, or network equipment.

name: Smart Doorbell/Security Camera Install
short_description: Professional mounting, wiring, and mobile app configuration for Ring, Google Nest, and Arlo security cameras and video doorbells.

name: Outlet & Switch Upgrade
short_description: Outlet and switch upgrades replacing outdated units with modern USB-A/C combo outlets, GFCI safety outlets, or contemporary rocker switches.

name: Smart Lock & Keyless Entry Install
short_description: Physical deadbolt removal, smart lock installation, and complete mobile app configuration for Schlage, Kwikset, Yale, and August smart locks.

name: Floodlight & Security Lighting
short_description: Hardwired installation of exterior security floodlights and motion-activated lighting for driveways, garages, and property perimeters.

name: Ceiling Fan Installation
short_description: Complete ceiling fan assembly and secure mounting by an experienced East Texas handyman.

name: Starlink Installation
short_description: Professional Starlink installation for your home, RV, or rural property.

name: TV Mounting & Cable Concealment
short_description: Professional TV mounting with fully concealed cabling — no power cords or HDMI cables hanging down your wall.

name: Whole-Home Surge Protection
short_description: Panel-mounted whole-home surge protector installation to protect every outlet and device in your house from power surges — including the smart home gear, network equipment, and electronics you've already invested in.

name: Cellular Signal Booster Install
short_description: Cellular signal booster installation (weBoost, SureCall) to eliminate dropped calls and slow data in rural East Texas dead zones.

name: RV Shore Power & Surge Protection Setup
short_description: Shore power connection setup and surge protection installation for your RV — at your home base, a permanent site, or a rural property.

name: Smart Thermostat Installation
short_description: Smart thermostat installation and mobile app setup for Nest, Ecobee, and Honeywell systems.

name: Home Network Diagnostic Visit
short_description: In-person diagnostic visit for ongoing internet or Wi-Fi problems that need hands-on troubleshooting rather than a new installation.

name: RV Pre-Trip / Pre-Purchase Inspection
short_description: A thorough walk-through of your RV's critical systems before a big trip or before you buy a used rig.

name: RV Electrical Diagnostic & Repair
short_description: Troubleshooting and repair for RV electrical issues — dead batteries, converter problems, 12V or 120V systems not working, outlets and breakers acting up inside your rig.

name: RV Solar & Battery Consultation
short_description: An on-site consultation to evaluate your RV's power needs and map out a solar and battery setup that actually fits how you use your rig — boondocking, seasonal travel, or full-time off-grid living.

name: RV Connectivity Bundle (Starlink + Cellular Booster)
short_description: Complete RV internet setup in one visit — Starlink installation paired with a cellular signal booster for redundant, reliable connectivity wherever you park.
